sections.paragraph:
Original: חובה

Transliteration: chôbâh

Phonetic: kho-baw'

BDB Definition:

Hobah = "hiding place"
  1. a city north of Damascus to which Abraham pursued the kings who had pillaged Sodom

Origin: fem. act. participle of H2247

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
